## NIAGARA SYSTEMS PLANNED (Next Cycle)

### NS_Fire_Campfire
- **Type:** GPU Simulation
- **Emitters:** Flame core, ember sparks, smoke column
- **Particles:** 512 max (LOD0), 128 (LOD1), billboard (LOD2)
- **Shadows:** Cast shadows on, dynamic
- **Trigger:** Placed at campfire actor location

### NS_Dino_Footstep
- **Type:** CPU Burst
- **Emitters:** Dust cloud burst, dirt spray radial
- **Scale:** Player = 0.3x, Raptor = 0.8x, T-Rex = 2.5x, Brachi = 3.0x
- **Trigger:** AnimNotify `FootStep` on creature skeleton
- **Sound sync:** Plays with `SFX_Footstep_Heavy` from Audio Agent

### NS_Weather_Rain
- **Type:** GPU Simulation
- **Emitters:** Rain streaks (vertical), ground splash rings, mist layer
- **Particles:** 4096 max GPU
- **Trigger:** WeatherController state = RAIN
- **Performance:** LOD2 disables splash rings beyond 40m

### NS_Blood_Impact
- **Type:** CPU Burst
- **Emitters:** Blood droplets radial, decal projection
- **Trigger:** `OnTakeDamage` event, impact point
- **Decal:** `M_VFX_BloodDecal` projected on ground/surface

### NS_Ash_Ambient
- **Type:** GPU Simulation
- **Emitters:** Ash flakes slow drift, variable wind direction
- **Particles:** 1024 max
- **Trigger:** Volcanic biome proximity (radius 5000m from volcano)

### NS_Damage_Flash
- **Type:** Screen-space UMG widget (NOT Niagara)
- **Effect:** Red vignette overlay, 0.15s flash, 0.5s fade out
- **Trigger:** `OnTakeDamage` → `UMG_DamageFlash` widget show/hide
- **Implementation:** `UUserWidget` with `UImage` + `FTimerHandle`

## LOD CHAIN (3 Levels — Mandatory for All Niagara Systems)

| LOD | Distance | Simulation | Shadows | Max Particles |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| LOD0 | < 20m | GPU full | On | 2048 |
| LOD1 | 20–80m | CPU | Off | 512 |
| LOD2 | > 80m | Billboard sprite | Off | 64 |
